items.title: Solana dismisses ‘shilling’ narrative: Can SOL/ETH eye an H2 breakout?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's dismissal of the 'shilling' narrative could enhance its credibility, potentially attracting more institutional interest and liquidity for SOL against ETH.

items.title: Morgan Stanley’s proposed 0.14% ETH and SOL fees could turn the next crypto ETF race into a price fight
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's proposed fees for ETH and SOL might intensify competition in the crypto ETF space, impacting SOL's market positioning and liquidity dynamics.

items.title: Solana beats Coinbase and Kraken in volume – What it means for SOL’s Q3
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana surpassing Coinbase and Kraken in trading volume indicates growing ecosystem usage, which could positively influence SOL's market perception and future performance.
